en: Do not make these mistakes if you want to sound natural in English
ko: 자연스러운 영어를 원하면 이 실수를 하지 마.

en: 1 Informations It's information It's an uncountable noun 2
Just say advice Like information this is uncountable so we don't use it
ko: 그냥 advice라고 해. information처럼 불가산이라 복수형으로

en: in the plural 3 To discuss about something We don't need about we
ko: 안 써. 3. To discuss about something. about이 필요 없어.

en: just discuss I'd like to discuss your performance 4
ko: 그냥 discuss해. I'd like to discuss your performance. 4.

en: Can you explain me the difference Is wrong We should say can you explain to me the difference
ko: Can you explain me the difference는 틀려. Can you explain to me the difference라고 해야 해.

en: Or can you explain the difference to me 5
ko: 또는 Can you explain the difference to me. 5.

en: I am agree This is incorrect I agree
ko: I am agree. 이건 틀려. I agree야.

en: Agree is a verb not an adjective Which ones are you guilty of saying Let me know in the comments
ko: agree는 형용사가 아니라 동사야. 어떤 거 실수한 적 있어? 댓글로 알려줘.
